steps.t: Hunulf can be found at the front gate of the Beorninghús. You should talk to Hunulf.
Hunulf can be found at the front gate of the Beorninghús. You should mourn Hunulf's passing.
Grimbeorn can be found at the Beorninghús. You should talk to Grimbeorn.
Léothred can be found at the front gate of the Beorninghús. You should talk to Léothred.
The Carrock can be found in the Beorninglands. You should light a candle for Hunulf at the Carrock.
Limlók can be found in the Floodfells. You should travel to Limlók.
Runerik Knotbeard is the Thane of Limlók, in the Floodfells. You should talk to Runerik Knotbeard.
